title: Four arrested for Mossel Bay robbery
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Four men (aged 21 to 29) were arrested following the armed robbery of a 21-year-old woman in Alhof Drive, Mossel Bay, on Sunday morning, 14 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Four men (aged 21 to 29) were arrested following the armed robbery of a 21-year-old woman in Alhof Drive, Mossel Bay, on Sunday morning, 14 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, said the woman had been walking to work that morning when she was accosted by a man with a firearm at about 06:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the man stole the woman’s iPhone, jumped into a vehicle and fled the scene. Members of the Mossel Bay Police Station, KwaNonqaba Police Station and the Mossel Bay Municipality Law Enforcement’s K9 Unit were deployed and a search for the vehicle began, which led to the four suspects being arrested later that day.","html":"He said the man stole the woman’s iPhone, jumped into a vehicle and fled the scene. Members of the Mossel Bay Police Station, KwaNonqaba Police Station and the Mossel Bay Municipality Law Enforcement’s K9 Unit were deployed and a search for the vehicle began, which led to the four suspects being arrested later that day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An imitation firearm believed to have been used during the robbery was also recovered.","html":"An imitation firearm believed to have been used during the robbery was also recovered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The four are expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today on a charge of robbery.","html":"The four are expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today on a charge of robbery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Four arrested for Mossel Bay robbery
